aadTenantId._comment: [MOCK] Replace with your Azure AD tenant ID (found in Entra ID → Overview)

aadClientId._comment: [MOCK] Replace with the client ID of the Veritas.Api app registration in Entra ID

openAiEmbeddingDeployment._comment: [MOCK] Confirm embedding model with search expert before deploying
